title: Cypilot Project Configuration (core.toml)
description: Schema for the project-level configuration file that defines kit registrations, resource bindings, and optional path overrides. Located at {cypilot_path}/config/core.toml. System identity is defined in artifacts.toml (see ADR-0014).

project_root.description: Relative path from the cypilot config directory to the project root. All artifact and codebase paths are resolved relative to this. Default: '..' (one level up from {cypilot_path}/config/).

kits.description: Map of kit ID to kit configuration. Kits registered here are merged into artifacts.toml at load time.

paths.description: Optional path overrides for non-standard layouts.

kits.description: Map of kit ID → kit configuration.

format.description: Kit format identifier. 'Cypilot' enables full tooling support (validation, traceability, code generation).

path.description: Relative path from the cypilot directory to the kit package root (e.g. '.core/kits/sdlc').

version.description: Kit version string, set during kit installation or update.

source.description: Source identifier for the kit (e.g. 'github:owner/repo'). Set during installation.

resources.description: Resource bindings for manifest-driven kits. Maps resource identifiers (from manifest.toml) to resolved filesystem paths. Written during kit installation; used by the resource resolution API to resolve {identifier} template variables.

path.description: Resolved filesystem path for this resource, relative to the cypilot directory. Written during manifest-driven installation.

template.description: Path to the template file for this artifact kind. Supports {project_root} token.

examples.description: Path to the examples directory for this artifact kind. Supports {project_root} token.

core.description: Relative path to the cypilot core directory. Used when the core is not at the default location.
